summary: Skyhawk Ops backend fully verified. 21/21 pytest test cases passed across all requested endpoints: auth (login/register/me + 401/400 edges), dashboard, schedule (week + shift detail + acknowledge), open-shifts (list, claim, waitlist, cancel-claim), timeclock (status, clock-in with geofence, break start/end, clock-out with hours calc), wallet (docs + qr_payload), announcements (list + acknowledge + 404), incidents (create + list; photos/signature stripped from responses as required), payroll (pipeline stages, current, totals), profile (user + equipment), onboarding (percent progress). Seed data present, JWT auth working, 401 returned for unauthenticated requests, duplicate email → 400, wrong password → 401. No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Unread count in /api/dashboard uses global filter (read_by ne uid) which is correct, but /api/announcements list is not filtered by site targeting (site_id ignored) — all guards see all site-specific announcements. Likely acceptable for MVP but worth confirming.
EMERGENT_PUSH_KEY is placeholder — falls back to local storage as expected. Not tested via pytest to avoid noise but code path is safe.

action_items: No backend fixes required. Proceed with frontend implementation/testing.
Consider filtering /api/announcements by site_id vs global (currently returns all announcements to every user).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~980 lines — consider splitting into routers/modules (auth, timeclock, shifts, wallet, incidents) if it grows further.
get_current_user returns 401 correctly, but FastAPI HTTPBearer with auto_error=False returns 403 when Authorization header is missing entirely on some paths; test allows both 401/403.
Login is case-insensitive via .lower() on email — good. Registration also lowercases. Consistent.
MongoDB _id consistently excluded via projections {'_id': 0} — good.
Break end idempotency: if action='end' while no active break, correctly returns 400.
Clock-in without site_id/shift_id sets geofence_ok=True by default — this is permissive; acceptable for the MVP demo but flag for production.
seed_data_creation: None created manually; backend auto-seeds users, sites, shifts, open_shifts, announcements, payroll, wallet_documents, equipment on empty DB. Tests use only seeded data + TEST_-prefixed transient users/incidents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is stable. Reuse /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. BASE_URL is hardcoded to https://ops-clock-in.preview.emergentagent.com. Guard credentials: guard@skyhawk.com / Password123. When testing frontend, note EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is used (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) in frontend/.env.
